# GoodNotes fixtures (self-generated, CC0)

- `gn-mac-mixed-pens.goodnotes` — GoodNotes 6 (Mac App Store, 2026-07-09),
  schema version 25. One page, drawn by Caleb: three pen scribbles
  (types 5, 0, 2 — pressure triplets), pencil (type 3, 11-float segments),
  highlighter (type 4, 24pt constant), brush/ball strokes (9-float and
  4-float segments), one shape-tool ellipse (type 7, geometry not inline).
  The app's own PDF export of the same doc lives in `corpus/` (gitignored)
  for overlay comparison.
